content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta for bead uh1 (planner reference cleanup). The implementation renamed BackendPolicyRole::Planner to Planning rather than removing it, which is correct since the variant is still needed for real planning stages (Planning/DocsPlan/CiPlan/PromptReview). Backward compat preserved via #[serde(rename="planner", alias="planning")], as_str() returning "planner", and FromStr accepting both strings. All acceptance criteria met: no BackendPolicyRole::Planner matches in src/ or tests/, docs/templates.md has no planner_positions references, conformance scenarios updated to direct-vote flow, panel_contracts.rs doc comments describe current reviewer-votes-directly behavior. Ran cargo check, cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo fmt --check, and 242 relevant unit tests — all pass. No correctness, safety, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
